title: Aalborg, North Jutland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Aalborg, North Jutland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Aalborg is a city in North Jutland with a population of 117,000. A historic port city in northern Jutland, known for its waterfront district, Aalborg University, and vibrant nightlife.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
